---
title: "Personnel"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: flatly 
    highlight: tango 
---


<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 40px;">

<div style="flex: 1; padding-right: 20px;">
<img src="images/holding_frog.jpg" width="200" style="border-radius: 10px;">
</div>

<div style="flex: 2;">
## Sidney Goedeker

I am a graduate from Hanover College with a Bachelor of Science in Biology and minor in Chemistry. I am currently pursuing a master of science in Ecology, Evolution, and Conservation Biology. I study amphibian immune responses to Chytridiomycosis, which is a fungal pathogen caused by *Batrachochytrium dendrobatidis*. I have a big interest in immunology, disease ecology, and host-pathogen interactions.

Contact: sgoedeker@unr.edu

</div>

</div>

<div style="display: flex; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 40px;">

<div style="flex: 1; padding-right: 20px;">
<img src="images/Weston.jpg" width="200" style="border-radius: 10px;">
</div>

<div style="flex: 2;">
## Weston

Certified as the best dog in the world! He loves to hike, travel, and be a couch potato. He will listen to all your ideas as long as he can get a treat or two. 

</div>

</div>
